heading: Public hearings
label: 2153 Public hearings
notes: Amendments2015—Subsec. (a). substituted “” for “”.Pub. L. 114–26section 4202 of this titlesection 3803 of this title2002—Subsec. (a). substituted “,” for “,”.Pub. L. 107–210section 3803 of this titlesection 2902 of this title1988— amended section generally. Prior to amendment, section read as follows:Pub. L. 100–418“(a) In connection with any proposed trade agreement under part 1 of this subchapter or section 2133 or 2134 of this title, the President shall afford an opportunity for any interested person to present his views concerning any article on a list published pursuant to , any article which should be so listed, any concession which should be sought by the United States, or any other matter relevant to such proposed trade agreement. For this purpose, the President shall designate an agency or an interagency committee which shall, after reasonable notice, hold public hearings and prescribe regulations governing the conduct of such hearings.section 2151 of this title“(b) The organization holding such hearings shall furnish the President with a summary thereof.”

children.heading: Opportunity for presentation of views
children.label: a Opportunity for presentation of views
children.text: In connection with any proposed trade agreement under or , the President shall afford an opportunity for any interested person to present his views concerning any article on a list published under , any matter or article which should be so listed, any concession which should be sought by the United States, or any other matter relevant to such proposed trade agreement. For this purpose, the President shall designate an agency or an interagency committee which shall, after reasonable notice, hold public hearings and prescribe regulations governing the conduct of such hearings. When appropriate, such procedures shall apply to the development of trade policy and priorities.section 2133 of this titlesection 4202 of this titlesection 2151 of this title

children.heading: Summary of hearings
children.label: b Summary of hearings
children.text: The organization holding such hearing shall furnish the President with a summary thereof.
